description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-push that runs on push to the calamares branch, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize events, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-latest job in a kdeneon/plasma:user container, prepare the environment, checkout the code, and then build and install Calamares using cmake and make. The workflow should also send notifications on success or failure to a Matrix room.
